hooks.command: $data = $input | ConvertFrom-Json; $file = $data.tool_input.file_path; if ($file -and $file.EndsWith('.py')) { ruff check --fix $file 2>$null; ruff format $file 2>$null } exit 0

$data = $input | ConvertFrom-Json; $file = $data.tool_input.file_path; $basename = [System.IO.Path]::GetFileName($file); if ($basename -eq '.env') { @{decision='block'; reason='Direct .env edits blocked — use .env.example or configure secrets in Azure Key Vault'} | ConvertTo-Json -Compress; exit 1 }; exit 0
